query:
-- A Copa do Mundo 2026 tem 8 Quartas de Final (QF1 a QF8)
-- Já existem 4 inseridos. Inserir os 4 restantes.
-- QF5: Vencedor R32-9 vs Vencedor R32-10
INSERT INTO games (tournamentId, teamAName, teamBName, phase, matchDate, venue, status, matchNumber, sourceMatchARole, sourceMatchBRole)
VALUES 
  (2, 'A definir', 'A definir', 'Quartas de Final', '2026-07-03 21:00:00', 'A definir', 'scheduled', 85, 'winner', 'winner'),
  (2, 'A definir', 'A definir', 'Quartas de Final', '2026-07-04 17:00:00', 'A definir', 'scheduled', 86, 'winner', 'winner'),
  (2, 'A definir', 'A definir', 'Quartas de Final', '2026-07-04 21:00:00', 'A definir', 'scheduled', 87, 'winner', 'winner'),
  (2, 'A definir', 'A definir', 'Quartas de Final', '2026-07-05 17:00:00', 'A definir', 'scheduled', 88, 'winner', 'winner');

-- Verificar total
SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM games WHERE tournamentId = 2 AND phase = 'Quartas de Final';
